ext.description: Sidebar catalog of templates with per-tool variants (claude / codex / gemini / cursor / windsurf / cline / aider / continue). Pick checkboxes → install into a folder. Workspace-root pre-flight auto-disables already-installed tools. Existing folders can be promoted into user templates. Right-click user templates to rename/delete/reveal.
cfg.defaultTool: Default tool variant pre-selected on each template's first reveal. Must match a subfolder name under <template>/.
welcome.empty:
No templates yet.
[Promote a folder as User Template](command:vibecodeAiMdSystem.promoteTemplate)
[Refresh](command:vibecodeAiMdSystem.refreshTemplates)
cmd.promoteTemplate: Vibecode - Add Folder as User Template
